title: Senior SEO Specialist at Tata CLiQ Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Tata CLiQ Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Tata CLiQ Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a SEO Specialist for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata CLiQ Capital India:
Tata CLiQ Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ Capital India!
